items.name: adminlte-theme
items.title: AdminLTE Theme
items.description: AdminLTE 2.4.2 color system with 16 named colors, CSS custom properties for runtime skin switching, layout constants, and utility functions.

items.name: skin-blue
items.title: Skin Blue
items.description: Blue skin for AdminLTE with dark sidebar and blue navbar (#3c8dbc).

items.name: skin-blue-light
items.title: Skin Blue Light
items.description: Blue skin with light sidebar (#f9fafc) and blue navbar (#3c8dbc).

items.name: skin-green
items.title: Skin Green
items.description: Green skin for AdminLTE with dark sidebar and green navbar (#00a65a).

items.name: skin-green-light
items.title: Skin Green Light
items.description: Green skin with light sidebar and green navbar (#00a65a).

items.name: skin-red
items.title: Skin Red
items.description: Red skin for AdminLTE with dark sidebar and red navbar (#dd4b39).

items.name: skin-red-light
items.title: Skin Red Light
items.description: Red skin with light sidebar and red navbar (#dd4b39).

items.name: skin-yellow
items.title: Skin Yellow
items.description: Yellow skin for AdminLTE with dark sidebar and yellow navbar (#f39c12).

items.name: skin-yellow-light
items.title: Skin Yellow Light
items.description: Yellow skin with light sidebar and yellow navbar (#f39c12).

items.name: skin-purple
items.title: Skin Purple
items.description: Purple skin for AdminLTE with dark sidebar and purple navbar (#605ca8).

items.name: skin-purple-light
items.title: Skin Purple Light
items.description: Purple skin with light sidebar and purple navbar (#605ca8).

items.name: skin-black
items.title: Skin Black
items.description: Black skin for AdminLTE with dark sidebar and white navbar with dark text.

items.name: skin-black-light
items.title: Skin Black Light
items.description: Black skin with light sidebar and white navbar with dark text.

items.name: use-collapsible
items.title: useCollapsible
items.description: Hook for collapsible box widget with CSS max-height animation (500ms slide toggle).

items.name: use-removable
items.title: useRemovable
items.description: Hook for removable box widget with slide-up animation then unmount.

items.name: use-box-loading
items.title: useBoxLoading
items.description: Hook for box loading overlay state with spinner toggle.

items.name: use-push-menu
items.title: usePushMenu
items.description: Hook for sidebar push menu toggle with responsive 767px breakpoint handling.

items.name: use-treeview
items.title: useTreeview
items.description: Hook for accordion treeview menu with expand/collapse animation.

items.name: use-control-sidebar
items.title: useControlSidebar
items.description: Hook for right control sidebar slide toggle.

items.name: use-layout
items.title: useLayout
items.description: Hook for calculating content wrapper min-height based on viewport, header, footer, and sidebar.

items.name: use-direct-chat
items.title: useDirectChat
items.description: Hook for toggling direct chat contacts panel visibility.

items.name: use-todo-list
items.title: useTodoList
items.description: Hook for managing todo list items with check/uncheck toggle and callbacks.

items.name: adminlte-button
items.title: AdminLTE Button
items.description: Button with 6 color variants (primary/success/danger/warning/info/default), flat style, social media variants, and 4 sizes.

items.name: adminlte-badge
items.title: AdminLTE Badge
items.description: Inline badge with 6 color variants for notification counts and status indicators.

items.name: adminlte-label
items.title: AdminLTE Label
items.description: Inline label with 6 color variants for categorization and status display.

items.name: adminlte-alert
items.title: AdminLTE Alert
items.description: Alert with success/info/warning/danger variants and optional dismissible close button.

items.name: adminlte-callout
items.title: AdminLTE Callout
items.description: Callout box with colored left border, title, and content for highlighting important information.

items.name: adminlte-progress
items.title: AdminLTE Progress Bar
items.description: Progress bar with 6 colors (aqua/red/green/yellow/blue/purple), 4 sizes, striped and animated variants, vertical mode, and description labels.

items.name: adminlte-modal
items.title: AdminLTE Modal
items.description: Modal dialog with colored header variants (primary/info/success/warning/danger), three sizes, and header/body/footer sections.

items.name: adminlte-tabs
items.title: AdminLTE Tabs
items.description: Tab navigation with colored header variants, custom box styling, header tools slot, and top/bottom position.

items.name: adminlte-carousel
items.title: AdminLTE Carousel
items.description: Image carousel with auto-play, indicators, and prev/next controls.

items.name: adminlte-dropdown
items.title: AdminLTE Dropdown
items.description: Dropdown menu with trigger element, items, headers, footers, and dividers.

items.name: adminlte-description-block
items.title: AdminLTE Description Block
items.description: Statistics display block with value, label, and up/down/flat trend indicator.

items.name: adminlte-users-list
items.title: AdminLTE Users List
items.description: Grid of user avatars with names and dates for displaying team members or recent users.

items.name: adminlte-products-list
items.title: AdminLTE Products List
items.description: Vertical list of products with image, name, description, and label for recently added products.

items.name: adminlte-form-control
items.title: AdminLTE Form Controls
items.description: Form elements including input, textarea, select with AdminLTE styling, validation states, and form groups.

items.name: adminlte-input-group
items.title: AdminLTE Input Group
items.description: Input group with addon text, icons, or buttons before/after the input field.

items.name: adminlte-checkbox-radio
items.title: AdminLTE Checkbox & Radio
items.description: Styled checkboxes and radio buttons with 5 color accents and inline/block layout.

items.name: adminlte-table
items.title: AdminLTE Table
items.description: Table with striped, bordered, hover, condensed variants and responsive wrapper.

items.name: adminlte-pagination
items.title: AdminLTE Pagination
items.description: Pagination component with flat variant, three sizes, and ellipsis for large page counts.

items.name: adminlte-chart-placeholder
items.title: AdminLTE Chart Placeholder
items.description: Chart container placeholder for line, area, bar, pie, and donut charts with configurable height.

items.name: box
items.title: Box Widget
items.description: AdminLTE box/card widget with header, body, footer, tools. Supports 6 color variants, solid fill, collapsible, removable, and loading overlay.

items.name: small-box
items.title: Small Box
items.description: Compact stat widget with colored background, large number, description text, icon, and footer link.

items.name: info-box
items.title: Info Box
items.description: Information display widget with colored icon area, text label, number value, and optional progress bar.

items.name: sidebar-menu
items.title: Sidebar Menu
items.description: Sidebar navigation menu with treeview support, section headers, icons, badges, and accordion behavior.

items.name: sidebar-user-panel
items.title: Sidebar User Panel
items.description: User information panel for the sidebar with avatar, name, and online status.

items.name: sidebar-search-form
items.title: Sidebar Search Form
items.description: Search form for the sidebar with themed input and button.

items.name: header-logo
items.title: Header Logo
items.description: Logo component for the main header with full and mini (collapsed) variants.

items.name: header-navbar
items.title: Header Navbar
items.description: Top navigation bar for the main header with sidebar toggle and custom menu slots.

items.name: messages-dropdown
items.title: Messages Dropdown
items.description: Navbar dropdown for displaying recent messages with avatar, name, text preview, and timestamp.

items.name: notifications-dropdown
items.title: Notifications Dropdown
items.description: Navbar dropdown for displaying notifications with icons and text.

items.name: tasks-dropdown
items.title: Tasks Dropdown
items.description: Navbar dropdown for displaying task progress with progress bars.

items.name: user-menu-dropdown
items.title: User Menu Dropdown
items.description: Navbar dropdown for user account with header banner, avatar, menu items, and sign out button.

items.name: main-header
items.title: Main Header
items.description: Top header bar containing the logo and navigation bar with responsive collapsing.

items.name: main-sidebar
items.title: Main Sidebar
items.description: Left sidebar with 230px width, themed colors, collapse/expand transitions, and mobile responsive behavior.

items.name: main-footer
items.title: Main Footer
items.description: Page footer with white background, border-top, and left/right content slots.

items.name: content-wrapper
items.title: Content Wrapper
items.description: Main content area with #ecf0f5 background, margin-left offset for sidebar, and transition animations.

items.name: content-header
items.title: Content Header
items.description: Page title section with h1 heading, subtitle, and breadcrumb navigation.

items.name: control-sidebar
items.title: Control Sidebar
items.description: Right sidebar panel with dark/light variants, tab navigation, and slide-in toggle.

items.name: timeline
items.title: Timeline
items.description: Vertical timeline with colored icon markers, time labels, headers, body content, and footer actions.

items.name: direct-chat
items.title: Direct Chat
items.description: Chat widget with message bubbles (left/right aligned), contacts panel toggle, and message input.

items.name: chat-widget
items.title: Chat Widget
items.description: Simple chat display with message list, avatars, timestamps, and message input.

items.name: todo-list
items.title: Todo List
items.description: Interactive todo list with checkbox toggle, strikethrough on completion, colored left border, and delete action.

items.name: profile-card
items.title: Profile Card
items.description: User profile card with cover image, avatar, name, role, and stats row in two layout styles.

items.name: admin-layout
items.title: Admin Layout
items.description: Complete AdminLTE layout wrapper with sidebar, header, content area, footer, and React context provider for layout state management.

items.name: dashboard-stat-row
items.title: Dashboard Stat Row
items.description: Responsive grid row for SmallBox or InfoBox stat widgets with 2/3/4/6 column layouts.

items.name: dashboard-overview
items.title: Dashboard Overview
items.description: Example dashboard page layout with stats row, main content area, side content, and bottom section.

items.name: login-page
items.title: Login Page
items.description: Authentication login page with email/password form, remember me checkbox, social auth buttons, and links to register/forgot password.

items.name: register-page
items.title: Register Page
items.description: Authentication registration page with full name, email, password fields, terms agreement, and social auth buttons.

items.name: lockscreen-page
items.title: Lockscreen Page
items.description: Lock screen page with user avatar, name, and password input to unlock the session.

items.name: error-404-page
items.title: 404 Error Page
items.description: 404 not found error page with large headline, message, search form, and dashboard link.

items.name: error-500-page
items.title: 500 Error Page
items.description: 500 server error page with large headline, message, search form, and dashboard link.

items.name: invoice-page
items.title: Invoice Page
items.description: Invoice layout with from/to addresses, line items table, subtotal/tax/shipping/total, and print button.

items.name: invoice-print-page
items.title: Invoice Print Page
items.description: Print-optimized invoice layout without navigation chrome.

items.name: profile-page
items.title: Profile Page
items.description: User profile page with cover image, avatar, stats, tabbed content area, and sidebar section.

items.name: blank-page
items.title: Blank Page
items.description: Starter/blank page template with content header, breadcrumbs, and empty box widget.

items.name: mailbox-layout
items.title: Mailbox Layout
items.description: Email mailbox with folder sidebar, email list with checkboxes/stars, read view, and compose view.
